global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear focus on a sale for a food delivery service.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small badge in the top left corner with the text 'UGC' in white on a purple background.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: A pair of stylized glasses or containers with a light purple tint, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Cravings message
elements.description: A bold, white text at the bottom stating 'Your cravings, delivered' with a smaller line below it saying 'Late-night deals available'.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Late-night deals available

elements.label: Sale headline
elements.description: A prominent, white text at the top reading 'PlateSprint SALE' with a yellow background highlight.

elements.label: Install button
elements.description: A bright, white button at the bottom with the text '€9.99 Install now' inviting action.

elements.label: Background color
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire ad space.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, late-night food delivery deals
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product image is centered, the body text is at the bottom, and the CTA is at the very bottom.
